text:
Pres Indicates whether, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite – being so fidgety or restless that they have been moving around a lot more than usual. 0. No
1. Yes 
9. No response CHAR 1 x
D0150H2_MOVE_SLOW_FREQ_CD Mood: Moving or speaking so slowly: Freq Indicates the frequency, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite –
